from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass
class OrderRecord:
    order_id: int
    customer_tier: str
    total_amount: float
    is_first_order: bool


@dataclass
class OrderDTO:
    order_id: int
    amount: float
    discount_pct: float


class OrderMapper:
    def to_dto(self, record: OrderRecord) -> OrderDTO:
        if record.customer_tier == "gold" and record.total_amount > 500:
            discount = 0.15
        elif record.customer_tier == "silver" and record.is_first_order:
            discount = 0.10
        elif record.total_amount > 1000:
            discount = 0.05
        else:
            discount = 0.0

        return OrderDTO(
            order_id=record.order_id,
            amount=record.total_amount,
            discount_pct=discount,
        )
